name: counter-picker
title: Counter / Metric Picker
description: Two-column metric-counter picker popup. A left rail composes a sticky search field over a scrollable list of selectable counter rows; the right pane is a metric-detail card showing the chosen counter's name, description, high/low interpretation and RCA guidance. Refined from the monolith .pop.wide / .cp-list / .cp-detail: rows are real <button>s with hover, focus-visible, selected (aria-pressed) and disabled states, and the floating-popover chrome is opt-in via the --floating modifier so it also renders as a self-contained card. Clicking a row single-selects it; typing filters the list. Shows an empty placeholder when nothing is selected.
